data.title: Thunk.AI introduces "Hi-Fi" benchmark for AI agent reliability, showcasing a remarkable 97.3% AI Fidelity score.
data.description: A technology company based in Seattle, Thunk.AI, has introduced a new benchmark named "Hi-Fi" to assess the reliability of AI agents. The benchmark aims to measure the accuracy and consistency of AI systems. In a recent demonstration, Thunk.AI revealed an impressive AI Fidelity score of 97.3% on its AI automation platform. This score signifies the high level of reliability and precision that the AI agent provides. This development showcases Thunk.AI's commitment to delivering advanced AI solutions with a focus on accuracy and performance.

data.title: Burnt secures $3.8M in funding to optimize food supply chain operations with AI, targeting legacy systems.
data.description: Burnt, a company based in San Francisco, made an announcement on September 25, 2025, revealing that they have secured $3.8 million in seed funding. This funding will be utilized to develop an AI-powered operating system aimed at automating operational workflows that are currently hindered by outdated systems and manual processes. The primary focus of this initiative is to address the inefficiencies that are impeding the global food supply chain.

data.title: Inventor creates safety tool for tow truck drivers after 30 years in industry, aiming to prevent accidents.
data.description: A Pittsburgh resident with over three decades of experience in the towing sector has highlighted the risks of unloading vehicles from dollies. The inventor, speaking in September 2025, shared concerns about accidents involving pry bars hitting operators' heads during the unloading process. The individual's insights draw attention to safety issues in the industry and aim to prevent such incidents, emphasizing the importance of implementing measures to enhance workplace safety.

data.title: Fall in Miami Beach offers cultural and culinary experiences with seasonal savings at hotels. Exciting events await travelers.
data.description: In Miami Beach, Florida, on September 25, 2025, the start of fall heralds a fresh wave of premier hospitality experiences. The season will feature a vibrant lineup of culinary events and exciting activities that highlight the city's dynamic atmosphere and rich cultural background. Visitors can look forward to a diverse range of...

data.title: Philadelphia FIGHT to host 35th Anniversary Gala on Saturday, November 22 from 6-9 pm at Loews Philadelphia Hotel.
data.description: The 35th Anniversary Celebrate Life Gala hosted by Philadelphia FIGHT Community Health Centers is scheduled to take place on November 22, 2025, from 6:00 to 9:00 pm at the Regency Ballroom in Loews Philadelphia Hotel, located at 1200 Market St, Philadelphia.

data.title: AVA Resort Cancun launches first-ever Winter Festival with unique experiences, live entertainment, and culinary delights.
data.description: AVA Resort Cancun, a recently established upscale resort in Mexico, has revealed the commencement of its inaugural Winter Festival. This multi-week family event in Miami, starting on September 25, 2025, will feature unique holiday experiences, live entertainment, and delectable culinary offerings. Located in Cancun, the resort aims to provide unforgettable experiences for visitors, offering a combination of diverse activities and entertainment for all ages.

data.title: Qount launches AI-powered 1099 Workflow saving accounting firms hundreds of hours each tax season.
data.description: In Plano, Texas on September 25, 2025, Qount, the Practice Intelligence Platform™ for public accounting firms utilizing AI technology, unveiled its upgraded 1099 Workflow system. This new system aims to streamline and simplify one of the most labor-intensive and anxiety-inducing tasks during tax season.

data.title: KuCoin appeals FINTRAC decision, reaffirms commitment to compliance in Turks and Caicos Islands on Sept 25, 2025.
data.description: In Providenciales, Turks and Caicos Islands, on September 25, 2025, KuCoin, a prominent global cryptocurrency platform known for its reliability, revealed that it has officially submitted an appeal against a recent ruling made by the Director of the Financial Transactions and Reports Analysis Centre of Canada (FINTRAC).

data.title: Allegion US introduces Schlage® Performance Series™ locks for commercial spaces; stylish and secure option.
data.description: Allegion US, a top security solutions provider, has introduced new locks in Carmel, Indiana on Sept. 25, 2025. The Schlage® Performance Series™ offers stylish and secure options for everyday commercial spaces. This launch signifies a significant advancement in security technology.

data.title: Webull expands globally with strong traction; Rosenblatt analyst predicts $19 price, low fees and advanced tools offered.
data.description: Webull Corporation (NASDAQ: BULL) stocks have risen as Rosenblatt analyst Chris Brendler gives them a Buy rating with a price target of $19. Webull is expanding globally and relaunching in the U.S. for cryptocurrencies, aiming to attract active retail traders with competitive fees and advanced technology. Brendler mentions that Webull separated its crypto division in 2023 due to regulations but has since reintroduced it in the U.S. Previously, crypto accounted for about 20% of revenue, although it is not projected to reach that level in the near future.

data.title: Jardins d'Arménie Royal Brandy launches in Monaco on Sept. 13, 2025. Gala attended by Prince Albert II and Ambassador of Armenia.
data.description: On September 13, 2025, Jardins d'Arménie Royal Brandy had its worldwide debut at Hôtel Hermitage Monte-Carlo in Monaco. The event was graced by the presence of H.S.H. Prince Albert II of Monaco and the Armenian Ambassador to France, Arman Khachatryan. This launch gala marked a significant moment for the brand, garnering attention on a global scale.

data.title: Europe's first AI-native EV brand, Perseus, partners with SODA.Auto to develop advanced AI-powered HMI.
data.description: In London today, Perseus Motor Corporation revealed its partnership with SODA.Auto to collaborate on developing the most advanced AI-powered Human-Machine Interface (HMI) worldwide. This alliance with SODA.Auto, a prominent figure in AI and Software Defined Vehicles, signifies a significant move in revolutionizing the interaction between humans and vehicles in the age of intelligent mobility. Perseus, as Europe’s initial AI-native EV brand, was established due to the recognition that current vehicles lack engagement, with this partnership aiming to address that.

data.title: Bitcoin's price falls to $111,000 sparking debate on bear market or dip; traders predict dip below $100,000 in 2026.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) has dropped to $111,000, sparking debate over whether this decline marks the beginning of a bear market or just a temporary dip in an upward trend. Trader Ansem has advised investors to consider accumulating BTC aggressively if the price falls below $100,000 next year or by the beginning of 2026, targeting an exit strategy by 2028. Ansem's perspective aligns with trader Plur Daddy, who has suggested that the traditional 4-year cycle theory may no longer be relevant. Plur Daddy anticipates potential upside movement in the market within a span of 3 to 6... More details can be found on a financial news platform.

data.title: Circle is contemplating making USDC transactions reversible to cater to traditional finance needs, in a bid for wider adoption.
data.description: Circle, the issuer of the USDC stablecoin, is contemplating the introduction of reversibility for transactions in response to demands from traditional finance participants. This step could potentially increase the appeal of USDC among users and market participants.

data.title: Jacquelyn Lane named Outstanding MDT Partner of the Year by CACNC for 2025.
data.description: In Graham, North Carolina, CACNC has announced that Jacquelyn Lane, the Assistant District Attorney of Burke County, has been named the 2025 Outstanding Multidisciplinary Team (MDT) Partner of the Year.
